prompts.name: Shy Smile
prompts.text: Give the subject a shy smile with softened eyes, slight blush, gentle posture, and reserved warmth.

prompts.name: Nervous
prompts.text: Give the subject a nervous expression with uncertain eyes, tense mouth, and subtle anxious body language.

prompts.name: Embarrassed
prompts.text: Give the subject an embarrassed expression with visible blush, averted gaze, and hesitant body language.

prompts.name: Teary Smile
prompts.text: Give the subject a teary smile with moist eyes, emotional softness, and a bittersweet feeling.

prompts.name: Blank Stare
prompts.text: Give the subject a blank stare with neutral mouth, unfocused eyes, and quiet emotional distance.

prompts.name: Suspicious
prompts.text: Give the subject a suspicious expression with narrowed eyes, tilted head, and cautious body language.

prompts.name: Proud
prompts.text: Give the subject a proud expression with lifted chin, confident eyes, and composed posture.

prompts.name: Annoyed
prompts.text: Give the subject an annoyed expression with slight frown, narrowed eyes, and restrained irritation.

prompts.name: Gentle
prompts.text: Give the subject a gentle expression with soft eyes, relaxed mouth, and kind presence.

prompts.name: Curious
prompts.text: Give the subject a curious expression with attentive eyes, slight head tilt, and open interest.

prompts.name: Worried
prompts.text: Give the subject a worried expression with tense brows, uncertain eyes, and protective body language.

prompts.name: Elegant Smile
prompts.text: Give the subject an elegant smile with refined composure, calm eyes, and graceful restraint.

prompts.name: Teasing Smile
prompts.text: Give the subject a teasing smile with playful eyes, slight smirk, and lively charm.

prompts.name: Awe
prompts.text: Give the subject an expression of awe with widened eyes, parted lips, and a sense of wonder.

prompts.name: Focused
prompts.text: Give the subject a focused expression with steady gaze, relaxed mouth, and clear concentration.
